name: NanoQueue v3 Release
description: Major refactor of the core queue engine. Adds persistent acknowledgments, retry policies, and dead-letter queue support. Daniel is leading API redesign.

name: LogStream 1.0 GA
description: Daniel's open-source log-streaming sidecar reaching 1.0 GA. Handles structured log ingestion from Kubernetes pods into the data pipeline.

name: Kubernetes 1.30 Cluster Upgrade
description: Rolling upgrade of production and staging clusters from k8s 1.29 to 1.30. Includes node drain strategy and workload compatibility checks.

name: Auth Service v2 - OIDC Support
description: Extend the auth-service to support OIDC/OAuth2 flows. Enables third-party identity providers and single sign-on for enterprise customers.

name: Go Client SDK v1.0
description: Official Go client library for NanoQueue v3. Covers queue creation, message publishing, consumer subscription, and DLQ binding.

name: Python Client SDK v1.0
description: Official Python client library for NanoQueue v3. Async-first design with asyncio support. Targets Python 3.11+.

name: NanoQueue v3 Documentation Site
description: Full rewrite of the docs site to cover v3 API, persistent acks, retry policies, DLQ, OIDC auth, and Go/Python SDK quickstarts.

name: SOC 2 Type II Readiness
description: Achieve SOC 2 Type II certification. Covers audit logging, access reviews, encryption at rest, and incident response documentation.

name: Cloud Cost Reduction - Q3 2026
description: Target 20% reduction in monthly cloud spend. Levers: spot node expansion, reserved instances for baseline workloads, and unused resource cleanup.

name: Grafana Dashboard Refresh - NanoQueue Ops
description: Rebuild the Grafana dashboards for NanoQueue operations: queue depth, dispatch latency, DLQ growth rate, and auth token issuance rate.

name: QA Test Automation Framework
description: Build end-to-end test automation for the NanoQueue API using testcontainers and GitHub Actions. Target: 80% critical-path coverage before each release.

name: Slack and PagerDuty Integrations
description: Native Slack alerts for queue depth thresholds and DLQ spikes. PagerDuty routing for critical NanoQueue production alerts.

name: NanoQueue Community Discord Launch
description: Launch a public Discord community for NanoQueue open-source users. Channels: announcements, help, feature-requests, showcase.

name: LogStream Contributor Onboarding
description: Write CONTRIBUTING.md, set up a good-first-issue label pipeline, and run first public office-hours session for LogStream contributors.

name: Performance Baseline - Continuous Benchmarking
description: Set up a CI job that runs NanoQueue throughput benchmarks on every main branch merge and publishes results to the internal Grafana dashboard.

name: Self-Serve Sign-Up Flow
description: Build a self-serve signup flow with trial provisioning, usage dashboard, and upgrade prompt. Reduce time-to-first-message from days to minutes.

name: ML Message Priority Scoring (Research)
description: Research spike: can message metadata be used to score urgency and auto-prioritize queue routing? Prototype using a simple gradient boosting model.

name: Mobile App Discovery - Q3 2026
description: Discovery phase for iOS and Android companion apps. User interviews, wireframes, and feasibility assessment. Decision gate at end of Q3.

name: Datadog Metrics Integration
description: Publish NanoQueue internal metrics to Datadog via the Datadog Agent. Enables customers running Datadog to get NanoQueue observability without Prometheus.

name: Monthly Release Train Process
description: Formalize a monthly release train: feature freeze on the 15th, RC cut on the 20th, GA on the 28th. Includes automated changelog generation and rollback runbook.
